introSection: Cornball Express is a wooden roller coaster at Indiana Beach in Monticello, Indiana, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Cornball Express was announced in November 2000. The ride opened on May 18, 2001.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: A mechanic was injured on September 3, 2016 when he was struck by the train on Cornball Express.

fullText:
Cornball Express is a wooden roller coaster at Indiana Beach in Monticello, Indiana, USA.

Cornball Express was announced in November 2000. The ride opened on May 18, 2001.

A mechanic was injured on September 3, 2016 when he was struck by the train on Cornball Express.
